tldr_zh: Samsung企業大規模導入ChatGPT，Apple發布iOS 27 AI功能，Polymarket虛假行銷遭曝光
tldr_en: Samsung deploys ChatGPT enterprise-wide, Apple unveils iOS 27 AI features, Polymarket's fake marketing exposed

items.title_zh: Samsung全球員工部署ChatGPT企業版，OpenAI最大企業規模落地
items.title_en: Samsung Deploys ChatGPT Enterprise Globally, OpenAI's Largest Enterprise Rollout
items.summary_zh: 三星電子宣布向全球員工部署ChatGPT企業版和Codex，標誌著OpenAI迄今最大規模的企業級AI應用落地。此舉展示大型科技企業對生成式AI的重視，預示著AI工具在企業生產力中的核心角色。
items.summary_en: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking OpenAI's largest enterprise AI rollout to date. This demonstrates major tech companies' commitment to generative AI and signals the pivotal role of AI tools in enterprise productivity.

items.title_zh: Apple iOS 27推出Siri重大AI升級與實用AI功能
items.title_en: Apple iOS 27 Introduces Siri AI Overhaul and Practical AI Features
items.summary_zh: 除了Siri的AI大改版，Apple在iOS 27中內建多項實用AI功能，超越單純的虛擬助手升級。這些功能深入整合於系統各處，強化用戶的日常使用體驗，展示Apple對裝置端AI的重視。
items.summary_en: Beyond Siri's AI overhaul, Apple's iOS 27 introduces numerous practical AI features throughout the system. These capabilities deeply integrate AI into everyday workflows, demonstrating Apple's commitment to on-device intelligence.

items.title_zh: Anthropic遭川普政府制裁，行業生態面臨重大變數
items.title_en: Trump Administration Cracks Down on Anthropic, Reshaping AI Ecosystem
items.summary_zh: 川普政府採取行動制裁AI新貴Anthropic，此舉將重塑美國AI產業競爭格局。業界關注此舉背後動機及可能受益者，涉及政治與商業利益的複雜交織。
items.summary_en: The Trump administration's crackdown on Anthropic signals potential shifts in the AI ecosystem's competitive landscape. Industry observers scrutinize the motivations and potential beneficiaries of this regulatory action.

items.title_zh: 大西洋雜誌公開AI訓練音樂數據庫，透明度提升
items.title_en: Atlantic Releases Searchable Database of Music Used to Train AI Models
items.summary_zh: 《大西洋》雜誌曝光四個用於訓練AI模型的音樂數據集，其中兩個分別包含1,200萬和900萬首曲目，並建置可搜尋的公開資料庫。此舉促進AI訓練資料的透明化，對音樂產業和AI開發具重要意義。
items.summary_en: The Atlantic exposes four music datasets used to train AI models, with two containing 12 million and 9 million tracks respectively, creating a searchable public database. This initiative enhances transparency in AI training data and impacts both music and AI industries.

items.title_zh: Ubisoft共同創辦人克勞德·基耶梅特墜機身亡，享年69歲
items.title_en: Ubisoft Co-founder Claude Guillemot Dies in Plane Crash at 69
items.summary_zh: Ubisoft與四位兄弟共同創辦人克勞德·基耶梅特在飛機事故中喪生，享年69歲。他為遊戲產業發展做出重大貢獻，其離世令遊戲業界倍感悲痛。
items.summary_en: Claude Guillemot, who co-founded Ubisoft with his four brothers, died in a plane crash at age 69. His passing represents a significant loss to the video game industry.

items.title_zh: Polymarket爆料付費製造虛假投注影片，欺騙推廣超千支
items.title_en: Polymarket Paid Creators to Post Deceptive Fake Bet Videos
items.summary_zh: 根據《華爾街日報》調查，預測市場Polymarket向創作者支付報酬拍攝虛假投注影片並在社群媒體推廣，逾1,100支影片存在欺騙性。此舉違反平台透明度原則，損害用戶信任。
items.summary_en: Wall Street Journal investigation reveals Polymarket paid creators to film fake bet videos for social media promotion, identifying over 1,100 deceptive clips. The practice violates platform transparency principles and damages user trust.

items.title_zh: Squid快取軟體爆發29年舊漏洞Squidbleed，密碼與金鑰洩露
items.title_en: Squid Proxy Software Exposes 29-Year-Old Vulnerability Squidbleed
items.summary_zh: 開源網頁代理伺服器Squid被發現存在長達29年的嚴重漏洞CVE-2026-47729，可導致HTTP存取的密碼與加密金鑰外洩。此漏洞威脅使用Squid的企業和個人用戶的資訊安全。
items.summary_en: Open-source Squid proxy server discovered to harbor a 29-year-old critical vulnerability CVE-2026-47729 that exposes HTTP passwords and encryption keys. The flaw threatens security for enterprises and users relying on Squid.

items.title_zh: 美伊瑞士首輪直接談判陷僵局，川普推文威脅升高局勢
items.title_en: First US-Iran Direct Talks in Switzerland Stalled Over Trump Threats
items.summary_zh: 美伊在瑞士進行談判，伊朗代表因川普推文威脅而退出會場，首輪談判未有進展。川普並揚言若必要將控制荷莫茲海峽並徵收20%通行費，局勢升溫。
items.summary_en: First direct US-Iran talks in Switzerland stalled as Iranian representatives walked out over Trump's threatening tweets. Trump escalated tensions by threatening to control Hormuz Strait and levy 20% transit fees on oil shipments.

items.title_zh: 衣索比亞執政黨大選壓倒性勝利，贏得約9成國會席次
items.title_en: Ethiopia's Ruling Party Wins Landslide Victory with ~90% of Parliament Seats
items.summary_zh: 衣索比亞總理阿比領導的繁榮黨在6月1日國會大選中取得壓倒性勝利，贏得約90%席次。儘管國內多地存在動盪，該黨仍維持絕對控制力。
items.summary_en: Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed's Prosperity Party won a landslide victory in Ethiopia's parliamentary election, securing approximately 90% of seats. The party retained overwhelming control despite unrest in multiple regions.

items.title_zh: 歐洲熱浪逼近40度，法國中西歐交通與野生動物面臨危機
items.title_en: Extreme Heat Wave Sweeps Central Western Europe, Approaching 40°C
items.summary_zh: 直逼攝氏40度的嚴重熱浪席捲歐洲多國，法國國鐵因電車線受損停駛，遊客面臨熱衰竭風險，野生動物亦面臨生存壓力。各國發布紅色警報應對。
items.summary_en: Severe heat wave sweeping Europe with temperatures approaching 40°C causes rail disruptions, threatens public health, and endangers wildlife. France halts railway operations due to track damage and heat concerns.
